perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a young woman walking away from the camera on a wet city sidewalk at night during rainfall. She is wearing a black hooded jacket and a short skirt, carrying several orange and light blue shopping bags. (2) As she walks, she frequently glances over her shoulder with a suspicious expression, her movements appearing guarded. (3) She suddenly stops and turns around completely to face the camera with an exaggerated, sassy pose—hands on her hips and a playful yet defiant facial expression, while the camera maintains a following distance.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, high-tempo hip-hop track featuring heavy bass. (2) A female vocal raps the lyrics 'I like my beats fast and my bass down low' in a confident, rhythmic tone. (3) Subtle ambient sounds of rainfall and distant city traffic are present in the background but are largely masked by the loud music track. No live speech is detected.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: 'POV：當妳被搭訕到怕了' (POV: When you are afraid of being hit on). This text appears at the top center in white throughout the video, setting a humorous and relatable tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (walking away in rain) -> Build-up (looking back suspiciously) -> Climax (turning around to face 'pursuer')

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the foreground; 1 female passer-by and 1 male passer-by visible in the background near a staircase.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black oversized hooded windbreaker, a black pleated skirt, and carrying multiple large shopping bags.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A wet urban sidewalk at night with neon store signs (GAMSOL, CARIN), a blue Taipei Metro (MRT) sign, parked cars, and a large tree with visible roots on the right. It is raining visibly.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural city night lighting with neon glows and reflections on the wet pavement.
visual_scene_and_style.colorTone: Cinematic with high contrast from street lights and reflections.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous social media skit illustrating the 'POV' of a woman who has been approached too many times by strangers in public. It uses the visual of her walking defensively in the rain and her final sassy turnaround to mock the awkwardness or persistence of street 'pick-up' culture while showcasing a stylish urban aesthetic.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of popular trending audio combined with a specific 'POV' caption format.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'relatability' factor for urban women. The presence of the Taipei Metro sign provides a specific geographic context.
